syncInfo.restoreWarning: "Restore" overwrites local scores and history — confirm first.
syncInfo.requirements: Requires Google sign-in (not guest) and active Pro.

somatotype.title: What is physique geometry?
somatotype.intro: Built on Heath–Carter somatotyping. Structure crosses three dimensions:
somatotype.mesoBody: Skeletal muscle, joints, and athletic proportion.
somatotype.ectoBody: Linearity, frame length, and visual proportion.
somatotype.outro: Height, weight, and bone inputs place your geometry ID and remodel path.

goldenRatio.title: How is Golden Ratio calculated?
goldenRatio.intro: A lean visual-aesthetics track — formulas from elite aesthetics and exercise physiology:
goldenRatio.outro: Lean without flat; full without bulky — clothes-hanger geometry.

appendix.title: Algorithm Notes
appendix.heathCarter: Built on Heath–Carter somatotype. Full clinical formulas need skinfolds and bone breadths; this app uses wrist girth plus body-composition inputs as a field-practical proxy (±2–4% residual).
appendix.genderTracks: [Gender Dual-Track] Male anchors: BF 12% / 9% / 7% with ΔSMM×0.48 arm weighting. Female elegant-line: BF 24% / 21% / 18%, FFM×0.85 residual, arm ΔSMM×0.28 (no double suppression). Golden Ratio mid-target: male BMI 23 / BF 11% / SMM = FFM×0.57; female BMI 19.5 / BF 20% / SMM = FFM×55%. Muscle-first upgrade fork: mass cleared + BF in bulk band (male ≤16% / female ≤25%) → [Legendary bulk]; mass cleared + BF high → [Cut]; under-mass → [Cut] or [Golden bulk] by golden BF. If live lean mass exceeds the gender-scaled ceiling, Legendary Defense expands point B so it never shrinks inward of current status.
appendix.legendaryDefense: [Extreme Morphotype] Default ceiling reflects population-normal lean-tissue upper bound. When measured muscle and arm already exceed that estimate, Legendary Physique Defense re-anchors and expands the ceiling from live metrics.
appendix.biaDisclaimer: [Measurement Variability] SMM uses the commercial BIA convention 0.57×FFM. Hydration swings (carb load, pump, creatine, inflammation) may shift readings ±3–5%. For physique tracking only — not medical diagnosis.
